scripts.db:init:sqlite: bunx dotenvx run --env-file ./.env -- bun run src/db/sqlite/init.ts
scripts.db:init:d1: bunx dotenvx run --env-file ./.env -- bun run src/db/d1/init.ts
scripts.test:providers:sqlite: bunx dotenvx run --env-file ./.env -- bun run src/tests/sqlite-providers.ts
scripts.test:providers:d1-remote: bunx dotenvx run --env-file ./.env -- bun run src/tests/d1-remote-providers.ts
scripts.test:sqlite: bun run db:init:sqlite && bun run test:providers:sqlite
scripts.test:d1-remote: bun run db:init:d1 && bun run test:providers:d1-remote
